global.description: The ad features a blue background with abstract shapes and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their spending with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: top blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background occupying the top portion of the ad.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract geometric shapes including circles and rectangles in a light color.

elements.label: overlapping shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle overlapping with smaller circles, creating a layered effect.

elements.label: large rectangle
elements.description: A prominent rectangle in the center, visually distinct with a contrasting color.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with a clear call to action, featuring bold text.

elements.label: hidden fees text
elements.description: Text stating 'No hidden fees' in a smaller font, positioned near the call to action.

elements.label: main headline
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Track every euro' prominently displayed in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Track every euro No hidden fees

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: A logo at the top left corner, featuring the brand name 'SwiftStack' in a clear font.

elements.label: Order now text
elements.description: Text reading 'Order now' in a bold font, positioned within the call to action button.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, simple and modern, key elements include abstract shapes and clear CTAs.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the logo is at the top left, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Track every euro, No hidden fees, SwiftStack, Order now
